rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's inline comment) points out that the test verifies device_communicator/reduce_scatter for PCP/DP/EP but not TP, even though TP now goes through the same init_vllm_model_parallel_group path — Candidate Y finds this almost exactly ('TP... lacks corresponding asserts. Add similar checks for vllm_parallel_state._TP'), while Candidate X's review never mentions it, instead giving a blanket APPROVE with a speculative caching-comment nit. Y's other two findings (untested pre-hook wiring, untested early-return/error branches) are grounded in the diff with specific file:line evidence and concrete suggested tests, giving it higher actionability; X's claims are plausible but amount to confirmation of correctness rather than surfaced issues.
